name: lint
title: rosync lint
description: Runs `luau-lsp analyze` against a project or path with an optional Ro Sync sourcemap.
notes: If `--luau-lsp` is omitted, Ro Sync checks `ROSYNC_LUAU_LSP` and then `PATH`.
Bundled Roblox definitions are used automatically when present under `tools/luau-lsp/roblox/`.
